description: Affiliate / partner relationships. The Supabase tools table is source-of-truth for runtime URLs (so /go/[slug] resolves quickly); this JSON is the auditable source-of-truth for terms, contacts, and contractual notes that don't belong in a DB row.

partners.notes: Placeholder — replace with real terms after signing.

_notes: When a partner is added: insert/update the matching Supabase tools row first; this JSON is updated last.
Status enum: active | paused | declined | pending.
commission_rate_pct is informational — actual payout depends on the network ledger.
